Media

Jenny’s media officer can be contacted by emailing wingrovei@parliament.uk
Click here to sign up for our Green Peer’s irregular email newsletters
Jenny is an experienced and outspoken speaker, her recent contributions to the House of Lords can be viewed here and her older constributions are here
Jenny’s legendary battles with London Mayor Boris Johnson livened up debates at the Greater London Assembly – see her Assembly YouTube channel for some highlights She has also spoken at length about her experience of being on the police’s domestic extremist database
